audience_policies.source_phrase: Allows for 2-for-1 ferry fees on weekdays to either Spectacle or Georges Islands. ALL TICKETS MUST BE PURCHASED ONLINE The code can be used throughout the entire 2026 season, which is listed below: Georges Island • May 15 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays • June 16 - September
